title: Bapi
html:
Stub. Bapi — nickname surfacing in Yahir's 2025–2026 social/professional orbit. Whether friend-call or prospect-call is unresolved without the Jan 2026 call audio.

First mentioned in the first batch reflective alongside Owen, Bubbas, Charlie, Stepheven; second mention in 2026 01 24 call with bapi.

Open questions

  • Surname / context? Friend or rankett prospect?
  • South-Asian-origin nickname (common in Bengali) or peer-coined?
